history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a game-style “LEVEL UP!” interface panel with a level progress summary and a profile-style circular avatar on the left.

The main subject is a centered rectangular UI card displaying “Hutao Assisten 1” at the top, a highlighted “LEVEL UP!” header above it, and several progress indicators including level, experience, and completion percentage.

The setting is a dark, digital background with a purple-to-dark gradient and soft glow effects, suggesting an on-screen menu or dashboard rather than a physical environment.

Visual Details: At the top of the image, large gold text reads “LEVEL UP!” with small decorative diamond shapes on both sides. Below, a large rounded rectangle panel contains the main content. Inside the panel, the title “Hutao Assisten 1” appears in bold white text with a small rounded badge reading “#3” to the right of the title. Under the title, “LEVEL PROGRESS” is shown in smaller text. On the left side of the panel is a circular avatar image featuring a stylized illustration with warm red tones and a red ring border; the inner figure includes a prominent red outfit and a small red caption-like text block, but most of the smaller text inside the avatar is not clearly legible. In the middle, there is a dark rectangular box showing “LEVEL 7” in white, and next to it a larger green-tinted box showing “EXPERIENCE 11 / 400” in white. Beneath the boxes is a long horizontal progress bar in dark gray with a small colored segment on the left and a “2%” indicator on the right. At the bottom of the panel are three smaller dark boxes labeled “MESSAGES 275,” “XP NEEDED 389,” and “NEXT LVL 8.” The layout is centered with evenly spaced UI elements, and the camera perspective is flat, like a screenshot. The lighting is entirely UI-based with consistent high-contrast white text and soft purple background glow.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
Hutao Assisten 1
#3
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL
7
EXPERIENCE
11 / 400
2%
MESSAGES
275
XP NEEDED
389

Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary: This image is a dark-themed game interface card showing a user’s leveling status. It displays the current level, experience progress toward the next level, and counts for messages and XP needed.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
